cards.front: What is the Chi-square distribution used for in statistical inference?
cards.back: as a test of goodness of fit

cards.front: Goodness of fit test is used to determine whether observed values in a dataset fit a specific distribution
cards.back: or null hypothesis of a specific distribution

cards.front: What is the null hypothesis in a Chi-square goodness of fit test?
cards.back: that the observed frequencies are equal to the expected frequencies under the null hypothesis

cards.front: Chi-square test of goodness of fit is used to test for any significant differences between observed and expected frequencies
What is the assumption of Chi-square test of goodness of fit?
cards.back: that the data are independent and the categories are mutually exclusive
